source_discovery_method: use the observed K12JobSpot public Jobs/Search API endpoint
list_fetch_method: bounded POST search windows through source runner
detail_fetch_method: not currently enabled; use only future fixture-backed detail extractors
pagination_method: bounded pageStartIndex/pageEndIndex windows; stop on stale pages or empty results
canonical_url_rule: build stable https://www.k12jobspot.com/Job/Detail/{id} URLs from source jobs[].id
source_job_id_rule: use source jobs[].id and build canonical /Job/Detail/{id} URLs
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, source id, or usable canonical/apply URL
location_text_rule: use source jobs[].location city, regionCode, and postalCode only
country_region_city_rule: map exact US regionCode with city/postal evidence to United States, preserve city and state code
remote_type_rule: use explicit remote/hybrid evidence only; concrete source-backed geo rows normalize as onsite
posting_date_rule: use source jobs[].postedDate; leave null if absent
rate_limit: strict public-board rate limit with long cooldown after 429/403

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: public writes require source_job_id plus title/company/canonical URL and geo or explicit remote/hybrid evidence

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: monitor with parser stats and live field-quality audit after deploy/source refresh
